name: Quest Rare Minerals Ltd.
description: Quest Rare Minerals Ltd. was a Canadian-based mineral exploration and development company headquartered in Toronto, Ontario. The company focused on the identification, acquisition, and advancement of rare earth element deposits, with its primary asset being the Strange Lake rare earth project located in northeastern Québec. The company was publicly traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol QRM. Following financial challenges, the company underwent an amalgamation process in 2018 and is currently classified as an inactive entity.
